seed_data.title: Banana Bright+ Eye Crème

recall.retrieval_summary: Our #1 eye cream got better AND brighter. Powered by a potent triple vitamin C complex with REAL gold, which improves delivery of vitamin C to the skin, Banana Bright+ Eye Crème is clinically formulated to instantly brighten, smooth and hydrate undereyes, while also visibly reducing fine lines and wrinkles and defendi…
recall.retrieval_body:
Our #1 eye cream got better AND brighter. Powered by a potent triple vitamin C complex with REAL gold, which improves delivery of vitamin C to the skin, Banana Bright+ Eye Crème is clinically formulated to instantly brighten, smooth and hydrate undereyes, while also visibly reducing fine lines and wrinkles and defending skin against harmful free radicals and pollution. The vegan, fragrance-free formula also features our iconic universally-flattering light-reflecting mineral pigments - inspired by makeup artist must-have, banana powder - to instantly-color-correct and revive tired undereyes. But that's not all: It's also crease-resistant and improves concealer wear.The skin under your eyes is up to 10x thinner than the rest of your face - and far more delicate. This potent vitamin C eye cream is highly effective, but might not be ideal for those with sensitive skin. Note: The skin under your eyes is up to 10x thinner than the rest of your face - and far more delicate. This potent vitamin C eye cream is highly effective, but might not be ideal for those with sensitive skin.

Add Banana Bright+ Eye Crème to your routine for the ultimate OLE GLOW® Treatment. Our bestselling vitamin C eye cream, with a new and upgraded fragrance-free formula, now featuring real gold, that brightens, visibly diminishes dark circles and crow's feet and improves concealer application and wear. Award winner for 2023 Allure's Reader's Choice.

IS KIND OF OUR THING C THE INNOVATION

C THE INNOVATION

snapshot.description_raw:
Our #1 eye cream got better AND brighter. 
Powered by a potent triple vitamin C complex with REAL gold, which improves delivery of vitamin C to the skin, Banana Bright+ Eye Crème is clinically formulated to instantly brighten, smooth and hydrate undereyes, while also visibly reducing fine lines and wrinkles and defending skin against harmful free radicals and pollution.

The vegan, fragrance-free formula also features our iconic universally-flattering light-reflecting mineral pigments—inspired by makeup artist must-have, banana powder—to instantly-color-correct and revive tired undereyes. But that’s not all: It’s also crease-resistant and improves concealer wear.The skin under your eyes is up to 10x thinner than the rest of your face—and far more delicate. This potent vitamin C eye cream is highly effective, but might not be ideal for those with sensitive skin.

Note: The skin under your eyes is up to 10x thinner than the rest of your face—and far more delicate. This potent vitamin C eye cream is highly effective, but might not be ideal for those with sensitive skin.
snapshot.ingredients_raw:
This product does not contain parabens, sulfates or phthalates

Triple Vitamin C Complex With Gold Delivery System 

- A powerhouse vitamin C trio for enhanced brightening & elasticity

- Gold Complexed Vitamin C ascorbic acid (pure vitamin C) + super-antioxidant glutathione combined with real gold to create a highly stable, water-soluble complex that improves delivery of vitamin C to surface layer of your skin

- 3-O-Ethyl Ascorbic Acid is a potent, water-soluble vitamin c derivative with superior stability & antioxidant capacity

- Tetrahexyldecyl (THD) Ascorbate is an extremely stable, oil-soluble form of vitamin C that pairs well with other types of vitamin C

Bioflavonoids 

- Citrus, plant-based antioxidant compounds that neutralize free radicals & other environmental aggressors

Hardy Orange Extract 

- An antioxidant-rich plant that thrives in harsh environments

- Pairs well with vitamin C, which helps brighten skin & reduce the look of dark spots

Banana Powder-Inspired Pigments 

- Naturally derived light-reflecting minerals

- Instantly illuminate your complexion

Full Ingredient List: 
Aqua/Water/Eau, Simmondsia Chinensis (Jojoba) Seed Oil, Butyrospermum Parkii (Shea) Butter, Isododecane, Coconut Alkanes, 3-O-Ethyl Ascorbic Acid, Cetearyl Alcohol, Glycerin, C18-38 Alkyl Hydroxystearoyl Stearate, Dilinoleic Acid/Propanediol Copolymer, Polymethylsilsesquioxane, Cocoyl Proline, Dimethicone Crosspolymer, Pentaerythrityl Tetraisostearate, Tetrahexyldecyl Ascorbate, Ascorbic Acid, Gold, Glutathione, Citrus Nobilis (Mandarin Orange) Fruit Extract, Citrus Paradisi (Grapefruit) Peel Extract, Glucosyl Hesperidin, Tocopherol, Tamarindus Indica Seed Polysaccharide, Poncirus Trifoliata Fruit Extract, Morus Alba Root Extract, Linoleic Acid, Linolenic Acid, Jojoba Esters, Caprylyl Glycol, Coco-Caprylate/Caprate, Propanediol, Polyglyceryl-3 Cocoate, Polyglyceryl-4 Caprate, Polyglyceryl-6 Caprylate, Polyglyceryl-6 Ricinoleate, Hdi/Trimethylol Hexyllactone Crosspolymer, Polyacrylate-13, Butylene Glycol, Polyglyceryl-3 Stearate, Polysorbate 20, Sodium Citrate, Polyisobutene, Beheneth-5, Acrylates/C10-30 Alkyl Acrylate Crosspolymer, Behenyl Alcohol, Sodium Hydroxide, Sorbic Acid, Sorbitan Isostearate, Citric Acid, Hydrolyzed Vegetable Protein, Stearic Acid, Palmitic Acid, Oleic Acid, Sorbitol, Silica, Sodium Benzoate, 1,2-Hexanediol, Xanthan Gum, Phenoxyethanol, Leuconostoc/Radish Root Ferment Filtrate, Mica, Iron Titanium Dioxide, Titanium Dioxide (Ci 77891), Iron Oxides (Ci 77491).

snapshot.pdp_how_to_use_raw: Gently apply to undereye area, use your ring finger. Wear alone or under concealer to improve and extend wear. For external use only. Use as directed. For the best experience and results, close jar tightly and store in a cool, dark, dry place (below 25° C or 77° F). Precautions: Do not use if allergic to vitamin C or any other ingredient in this formula. If irritation occurs, discontinue use.
snapshot.pdp_description_raw:
Our #1 eye cream got better AND brighter.
Powered by a potent triple vitamin C complex with REAL gold, which improves delivery of vitamin C to the skin, Banana Bright+ Eye Crème is clinically formulated to instantly brighten, smooth and hydrate undereyes, while also visibly reducing fine lines and wrinkles and defending skin against harmful free radicals and pollution.

The vegan, fragrance-free formula also features our iconic universally-flattering light-reflecting mineral pigments - inspired by makeup artist must-have, banana powder - to instantly-color-correct and revive tired undereyes. But that's not all: It's also crease-resistant and improves concealer wear.The skin under your eyes is up to 10x thinner than the rest of your face - and far more delicate. This potent vitamin C eye cream is highly effective, but might not be ideal for those with sensitive skin.

Note: The skin under your eyes is up to 10x thinner than the rest of your face - and far more delicate. This potent vitamin C eye cream is highly effective, but might not be ideal for those with sensitive skin.

seed_data.pdp_how_to_use_raw: Gently apply to undereye area, use your ring finger. Wear alone or under concealer to improve and extend wear. For external use only. Use as directed. For the best experience and results, close jar tightly and store in a cool, dark, dry place (below 25° C or 77° F). Precautions: Do not use if allergic to vitamin C or any other ingredient in this formula. If irritation occurs, discontinue use.
seed_data.pdp_description_raw:
Our #1 eye cream got better AND brighter.
Powered by a potent triple vitamin C complex with REAL gold, which improves delivery of vitamin C to the skin, Banana Bright+ Eye Crème is clinically formulated to instantly brighten, smooth and hydrate undereyes, while also visibly reducing fine lines and wrinkles and defending skin against harmful free radicals and pollution.

The vegan, fragrance-free formula also features our iconic universally-flattering light-reflecting mineral pigments - inspired by makeup artist must-have, banana powder - to instantly-color-correct and revive tired undereyes. But that's not all: It's also crease-resistant and improves concealer wear.The skin under your eyes is up to 10x thinner than the rest of your face - and far more delicate. This potent vitamin C eye cream is highly effective, but might not be ideal for those with sensitive skin.

Note: The skin under your eyes is up to 10x thinner than the rest of your face - and far more delicate. This potent vitamin C eye cream is highly effective, but might not be ideal for those with sensitive skin.

description_raw.value: Add Banana Bright+ Eye Crème to your routine for the ultimate OLE GLOW® Treatment. Our bestselling vitamin C eye cream, with a new and upgraded fragrance-free formula, now featuring real gold, that brightens, visibly diminishes dark circles and crow's feet and improves concealer application and wear. value.heading: Details
value.body:
Our #1 eye cream got better AND brighter.

Powered by a potent triple vitamin C complex with REAL gold, which improves delivery of vitamin C to the skin, Banana Bright+ Eye Crème is clinically formulated to instantly brighten, smooth and hydrate undereyes, while also visibly reducing fine lines and wrinkles and defending skin against harmful free radicals and pollution.

The vegan, fragrance-free formula also features our iconic universally-flattering light-reflecting mineral pigments - inspired by makeup artist must-have, banana powder - to instantly-color-correct and revive tired undereyes. But that's not all: It's also crease-resistant and improves concealer wear.The skin under your eyes is up to 10x thinner than the rest of your face - and far more delicate. This potent vitamin C eye cream is highly effective, but might not be ideal for those with sensitive skin.

Note: The skin under your eyes is up to 10x thinner than the rest of your face - and far more delicate. This potent vitamin C eye cream is highly effective, but might not be ideal for those with sensitive skin.

Why did Banana Bright Eye Crème change?

Wondering how and why the formula changed? Banana Bright+ Eye Crème is an upgraded formulation of our #1 bestselling eye cream. It now includes a triple vitamin C complex with real gold for enhanced brightening and elasticity. It's still an efficacious eye cream for dark circles, fine lines and wrinkles.

We heard your feedback for the original formula and wanted to ensure that everyone feels like they experience the magic of our best vitamin C eye cream. Based off popular request, the new formula is fragrance-free.

On top of the new gold complexed vitamin C, this updated brightening eye cream is jam packed with antioxidants from citrus bioflavonoids and hardy orange extract. Banana Bright+ Eye Crème is clean, vegan and cruelty-free.

Benefits & Clinicals*
29% brighter undereyes
40% reduction in crows feet
70% more hydrated instantly
Improves & extends concealer wear
Fragrance free
Clean, vegan & cruelty-free
95% agree it brightens dull, tired looking skin
97% agree it improves skin quality & creates healthier-looking skin
89% agree it blurs the look of dark circles, lines & wrinkles

*In an 8-week clinical study of 38 people

value.heading: How to Use
value.body: Gently apply to undereye area, use your ring finger. Wear alone or under concealer to improve and extend wear. For external use only. Use as directed. For the best experience and results, close jar tightly and store in a cool, dark, dry place (below 25° C or 77° F). Precautions: Do not use if allergic to vitamin C or any other ingredient in this formula. If irritation occurs, discontinue use.

value.heading: Ingredients
value.body:
This product does not contain parabens, sulfates or phthalates Triple Vitamin C Complex With Gold Delivery System A powerhouse vitamin C trio for enhanced brightening & elasticity
Gold Complexed Vitamin C ascorbic acid (pure vitamin C) + super-antioxidant glutathione combined with real gold to create a highly stable, water-soluble complex that improves delivery of vitamin C to surface layer of your skin
3-O-Ethyl Ascorbic Acid is a potent, water-soluble vitamin c derivative with superior stability & antioxidant capacity
Tetrahexyldecyl (THD) Ascorbate is an extremely stable, oil-soluble form of vitamin C that pairs well with other types of vitamin C Bioflavonoids Citrus, plant-based antioxidant compounds that neutralize free radicals & other environmental aggressors Hardy Orange Extract An antioxidant-rich plant that thrives in harsh environments
Pairs well with vitamin C, which helps brighten skin & reduce the look of dark spots Banana Powder-Inspired Pigments Naturally derived light-reflecting minerals
Instantly illuminate your complexion Full Ingredient List: Aqua/Water/Eau, Simmondsia Chinensis (Jojoba) Seed Oil, Butyrospermum Parkii (Shea) Butter, Isododecane, Coconut Alkanes, 3-O-Ethyl Ascorbic Acid, Cetearyl Alcohol, Glycerin, C18-38 Alkyl Hydroxystearoyl Stearate, Dilinoleic Acid/Propanediol Copolymer, Polymethylsilsesquioxane, Cocoyl Proline, Dimethicone Crosspolymer, Pentaerythrityl Tetraisostearate, Tetrahexyldecyl Ascorbate, Ascorbic Acid, Gold, Glutathione, Citrus Nobilis (Mandarin Orange) Fruit Extract, Citrus Paradisi (Grapefruit) Peel Extract, Glucosyl Hesperidin, Tocopherol, Tamarindus Indica Seed Polysaccharide, Poncirus Trifoliata Fruit Extract, Morus Alba Root Extract, Linoleic Acid, Linolenic Acid, Jojoba Esters, Caprylyl Glycol, Coco-Caprylate/Caprate, Propanediol, Polyglyceryl-3 Cocoate, Polyglyceryl-4 Caprate, Polyglyceryl-6 Caprylate, Polyglyceryl-6 Ricinoleate, Hdi/Trimethylol Hexyllactone Crosspolymer, Polyacrylate-13, Butylene Glycol, Polyglyceryl-3 Stearate, Polysorbate 20, Sodium Citrate, Polyisobutene, Beheneth-5, Acrylates/C10-30 Alkyl Acrylate Crosspolymer, Behenyl Alcohol, Sodium Hydroxide, Sorbic Acid, Sorbitan Isostearate, Citric Acid, Hydrolyzed Vegetable Protein, Stearic Acid, Palmitic Acid, Oleic Acid, Sorbitol, Silica, Sodium Benzoate, 1,2-Hexanediol, Xanthan Gum, Phenoxyethanol, Leuconostoc/Radish Root Ferment Filtrate, Mica, Iron Titanium Dioxide, Titanium Dioxide (Ci 77891), Iron Oxides (Ci 77491).
